elements.title: lang::report_page_037_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_ue.id,
       kbi_u.email,
       kbi_u.idnumber,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_c.id         AS course_id,
       kbi_c.shortname,
       kbi_ue.status    AS enroll_status,
       kbi_ue.timestart AS enroll_started,
       kbi_ue.timeend,
       kbi_lit.lastaccess,
       kbi_ra.roles     AS role_name
FROM mdl_course kbi_c
       JOIN mdl_enrol kbi_e ON kbi_e.courseid = kbi_c.id
       JOIN mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue ON kbi_ue.enrolid = kbi_e.id
       JOIN (SELECT kbi_ra.userid,
                    kbi_ctx.instanceid     AS course_id,
                    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN kbi_r.name = '' THEN kbi_r.shortname ELSE kbi_r.name END) SEPARATOR
                                 ', ') AS roles
             FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
                    JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
                    JOIN mdl_role kbi_r ON kbi_r.id = kbi_ra.roleid
             WHERE kbi_ra.id > 0
               AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
               AND kbi_ctx.instanceid = :courseid
             GROUP BY kbi_ra.userid, kbi_ctx.instanceid) ra ON kbi_ra.userid = kbi_ue.userid AND kbi_ra.course_id = kbi_e.courseid
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ra.userid AND kbi_ue.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_lit ON kbi_lit.userid = kbi_u.id AND kbi_lit.page = 'course' AND kbi_lit.param = kbi_c.id
WHERE kbi_u.id IS NOT NULL
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
